event: Woman Standing Before a Church Facade
description: A black-and-white photograph showing a woman standing alone in front of a symmetrical white church facade. The church has two bell towers topped with domed cupolas and crosses, a central pediment with a round window or niche, arched windows, and a large dark doorway at center. Two street lamps flank the entrance. The woman stands small against the imposing facade, wearing a dark dress. The stark contrast between the bright white walls and dark openings creates a dramatic graphic composition.
